title: Dekton 9pc Soft Grip Go Through Screwdriver Set - Impact Cap And Thru-blade Suitable For Hammer Blows| Magnetic Tips Help To Stop Slipping And Can Be Used To Pick Up Screws| Soft Feel Grip For Comfort
features: Impact Cap and Thru-Blade for Hammer Blows: The Dekton 9pc Soft Grip Go Through Screwdriver Set features a robust design with impact caps and thru-blades, allowing these screwdrivers to withstand hammer blows. This added durability is perfect for heavy-duty applications where extra force is required to drive screws

Magnetic Tips for Precision and Convenience: Each screwdriver in this set is equipped with magnetic tips that help prevent slipping and ensure accurate screw placement. The magnetic feature also allows you to easily pick up and hold screws, reducing the hassle of dropping or losing them during installation or repair tasks.

Soft Feel Grip for Maximum Comfort: The ergonomically designed soft feel grips provide superior comfort and control during use. The handles are made from a non-slip material that reduces hand fatigue and ensures a secure grip, even in challenging conditions or extended work sessions. This thoughtful design enhances overall user experience and effectiveness.

Versatile Set for Various Applications: This 9-piece screwdriver set includes a range of sizes and types to accommodate different screws and projects. Whether you're working on electronics, home repairs, or assembling furniture, this set offers the versatility needed for a wide range of tasks, making it a valuable addition to any toolbox.

Durable and Long-Lasting Construction: Crafted from high-quality materials, these screwdrivers are built to endure rigorous use. The durable construction ensures that the tools can handle tough jobs without deforming or breaking, while the corrosion-resistant finish maintains their appearance and functionality over time.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide. DEKTON 9Pc Soft Grip Go Through Screwdriver Set Impact cap and thru-blade suitable for hammer blows. Magnetic tips to help stop slipping and can be used to pick up screws. Soft feel grip for comfort. Sizes: Flat: 5mm x 75mm, 5mm x 100mm, 6mm x 100mm, 6mm x 125mm, 8mm x 200mm. Pozi: PZ1 x 75mm, PZ2 x 100mm, PZ2 x 125mm, PZ3 x 200mm.
